channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Billboard’s Music Industry Events Calendar
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to the latest music industry update. If you're looking for a one-stop shop for all the major music events happening around the world, you're in luck. Billboard Pro has just launched a comprehensive music industry events calendar, featuring conferences, festivals, networking mixers, and more.
From now on, you can find all the key dates in one place, from January 2027's globalFEST winter festival in New York, to a whole year's worth of events. Whether you're an artist, promoter, or industry professional, this calendar is your go-to guide for staying ahead of the curve.
And the best part? If you've got an event you want to share with the world, you can get it listed on the calendar too. Just reach out to joe.maimone@billboard.com for more information.
[Outro music plays]
Host: "That's it for today's update. Stay tuned for more music industry news, and don't forget to check out Billboard Pro's events calendar for all the latest happenings in the world of music."
